title: My melody PvP era pack x Dissatisfied
description: this resource pack is a my melody themed pvp pack for minecraft!
body:
this resourcepack add redesigned things like 
- custom items (not 3d)
- custom blocks
- custom gui
- custom buttoms
- themed things (my melody)
- custom armors (diamond and netherite)
- custom pvp items

### ! COLLABORATION WITH DISSATISFIED PACK @GALACTICUNIV !
in game changes :
